segments.text: CAROLINE: Good Morning. Youth Council. Caroline speaking.
segments.translation: 卡洛琳：早上好。这里是青年委员会。我是卡洛琳。

segments.text: ROGER: Oh, hello, I'm interested in standing for election to the Youth Council, and I was told to give you a call.
segments.translation: 罗杰：哦，您好。我想参加青年委员会的选举，别人让我给您打电话。

segments.text: CAROLINE: That's good. Could I have your name, please?
segments.translation: 卡洛琳：好的。能告诉我您的姓名么？

segments.text: ROGER: Yes, it's Roger Brown.
segments.translation: 罗杰：嗯，我叫罗杰·布朗。

segments.text: CAROLINE: Thank you. I'm Caroline, the Youth Council administrator.
segments.translation: 卡洛琳：谢谢。我叫卡洛琳，是青年委员会的负责人。

segments.text: So do you know much about what the Council does, Roger?
segments.translation: 罗杰，你对委员会了解多少？

segments.text: ROGER: I've talked to Stephanie - I think she's the chair of the Council.
segments.translation: 罗杰：我之前和斯蒂芬妮沟通过，她应该是委员会主席。

segments.text: CAROLINE: That's right.
segments.translation: 卡洛琳：是的。

segments.text: ROGER: And she told me a lot about it.
segments.translation: 罗杰：她跟我说了很多。

segments.text: How it's a way for young people to discuss local issues, for example, and make suggestions to the town council.
segments.translation: 在这里，年轻人可以探讨本地议题，比如，为市政会提建议。

segments.text: That's what made me interested.
segments.translation: 我对此很感兴趣。

segments.text: CAROLINE: Fine. Well let me take down some of your details.
segments.translation: 卡洛琳：好的。让我来了解你的一些情况。

segments.text: First of all, how old are you?
segments.translation: 首先，请问你的年龄？

segments.text: You know the Council is for young people aged from 13 to 18?
segments.translation: 你是否知道委员会里的年轻人年龄限制是13岁至18岁之间？

segments.text: ROGER: I've just turned 18.
segments.translation: 罗杰：我正好18岁。

segments.text: CAROLINE: And where do you live, Roger?
segments.translation: 卡洛琳：那么罗杰，你住在哪里？

segments.text: ROGER: Well, that's a bit complicated.
segments.translation: 罗杰：嗯，这说起来有点复杂。

segments.text: At the moment I'm looking for a flat to rent here, so I'm in a hostel from Monday to Friday.
segments.translation: 现在我正在附近租房子，所以现在每周一到周五我住旅馆。

segments.text: I go back to my parents' place at the weekend.
segments.translation: 周末回我父母那里住。

segments.text: CAROLINE: OK, so where's the best place to send you some information about the Council?
segments.translation: 卡洛琳：好，如果要给你寄一些委员会的通知那么最合适的地址是哪呢？

segments.text: ROGER: Oh, to my parents' address, please.
segments.translation: 罗杰：哦，请寄到我父母那里吧。

segments.text: That's 17, Buckleigh Street - B-U-C-K-L-E-I-G-H Street, Stamford, Lincolnshire, though you don't really need the county.
segments.translation: 罗杰：地址是林肯郡斯坦福德镇柏克里其大街17号。其实你也不需要镇的名字。

segments.text: CAROLINE: Oh, I know Stamford - it's a lovely town.
segments.translation: 卡洛琳：哦，我知道斯坦福德，很不错的地方。

segments.text: And what's the postcode?
segments.translation: 邮编是？

segments.text: ROGER: PE9 7QT.
segments.translation: 罗杰：PE9 7QT。

segments.text: CAROLINE: Right, thank you.
segments.translation: 卡洛琳：好的，谢谢。

segments.text: So are you working here, or are you a student?
segments.translation: 你在这里工作还是上学？

segments.text: ROGER: I started studying at the university a couple of weeks ago, and I've got a part-time job for a few hours a week.
segments.translation: 罗杰：我在这里已经上了几周的课了，每周我还会兼职几个小时。

segments.text: CAROLINE: What do you do?
segments.translation: 卡洛琳：那你都做什么呢？

segments.text: ROGER: Well, I've done several different things.
segments.translation: 罗杰：嗯，我做了很多事情。

segments.text: I've just finished a short-term contract as a courier, and now I'm working as a waiter in one of the big hotels.
segments.translation: 我刚完成一个短期导游工作，现在我在一家大酒店做服务员。

segments.text: CAROLINE: Uhuh. That can't leave you much time for studying!
segments.translation: 卡洛琳：嗯。那你学习的时间可就不多了！

segments.text: ROGER: Oh, it's not too bad.
segments.translation: 罗杰：哦，还好啦。

segments.text: I manage to fit it all in.
segments.translation: 我会合理安排的。

segments.text: CAROLINE: What are you studying?
segments.translation: 卡洛琳：你学的什么专业？

segments.text: ROGER: My ambition is to go into parliament eventually, so my major subject is politics.
segments.translation: 罗杰：我志向是成为国会议员，所以我选择的专业是政治。

segments.text: That's partly why I think the Youth Council is important and want to be a part of it.
segments.translation: 这也是为什么我认为青年委员会很重要，想要加入它的原因。

segments.text: CAROLINE: And I suppose you've also taking a minor subject, aren't you?
segments.translation: 卡洛琳：我猜你还选择了其他专业，对吧？

segments.text: I know a lot of people study economics too.
segments.translation: 我知道的好多人还选择了经济。

segments.text: ROGER: I chose history.
segments.translation: 罗杰：我选的是历史。

segments.text: To be honest, I'm not finding it as interesting as I expected!
segments.translation: 说实话，我觉得它没有我想象中那么有意思！

segments.text: CAROLINE: OK, so with your studying and your part-time job, do you have time for any other interests or hobbies?
segments.translation: 卡洛琳：好吧，在你学习和工作之余，你还有其他爱好吗？

segments.text: ROGER: Well, I spend quite a lot of time cycling - both around town to get to university and to work, and also long-distance, from here to London, for instance.
segments.translation: 罗杰：嗯，我大部分时间会去骑行，在城里骑车去上学或工作。我还会骑到远一些的地方，比如从这里到伦敦。

segments.text: CAROLINE: That's pretty impressive! Anything else?
segments.translation: 卡洛琳：真不错！还有吗？

segments.text: ROGER: For relaxation I'm also keen on the cinema - I used to go at least once a week, but I can't manage to go so often now.
segments.translation: 罗杰：放松的时候我还会去电影院。原来我每周至少去一次，但是现在我去的少了。

segments.text: CAROLINE: Right. Are you sure you'll have enough time for the Youth Council?
segments.translation: 卡洛琳：好。你确定你有足够的时间来青年委员会吗？

segments.text: ROGER: Yes, I've worked out that I can afford to reduce my hours at work, and that will make the time.
segments.translation: 罗杰：是的，我已经安排好，我可以削减我工作的时间，这样就可以了。

segments.text: CAROLINE: So is there any particular aspect of the Youth Council's work that appeals to you, Roger?
segments.translation: 卡洛琳：那么青年委员会的工作有哪些特别的方面吸引你么，罗杰？

segments.text: ROGER: Well my sister is blind, so I'm particularly interested in working with disabled young people, to try and improve the quality of their lives.
segments.translation: 罗杰：嗯，我的妹妹是盲人，所以我对帮助残疾青少年的工作更感兴趣，尽力改善他们的生活质量。

segments.text: CAROLINE: That's great.
segments.translation: 卡洛琳：很好。

segments.text: Well, the best way to get involved is to be nominated by some people who you know.
segments.translation: 嗯，现在加入的最好方式是让你认识的人为你推荐。

segments.text: ROGER: Right. Can you tell me how to set about organising that?
segments.translation: 罗杰：好。能告诉我如何做吗？

segments.text: CAROLINE: You should talk to Jeffrey, our Elections Officer.
segments.translation: 卡洛琳：你应该和我们的选举官杰弗里聊聊。

segments.text: I can arrange a meeting in the council office with him, if you like.
segments.translation: 如果你愿意，我可以帮你约他到委员会办公室谈谈。

segments.text: ROGER: Yes, please.
segments.translation: 罗杰：好的，麻烦您了。

segments.text: CAROLINE: He'll be here next Monday, if that suits you.
segments.translation: 卡洛琳：如果可以的话，他下周一会来。

segments.text: ROGER: That's the 14th, isn't it?
segments.translation: 罗杰：是14号对吗？

segments.text: CAROLINE: Yes.
segments.translation: 卡洛琳：是的。

segments.text: ROGER: I can manage late afternoon.
segments.translation: 罗杰：我可以订到下午晚些时候。

segments.text: CAROLINE: Would you like to suggest a time?
segments.translation: 卡洛琳：你要先定个时间吗？

segments.text: He generally leaves around 5.30.
segments.translation: 他通常会在5:30的时候离开。

segments.text: ROGER: Well, would 4.30 be OK?
segments.translation: 罗杰：嗯，那4:30如何？

segments.text: My last class finishes at 4, so I'd have plenty of time to get to your office.
segments.translation: 我最后一节课在4点结束，这样我有充足的时间到您的办公室。

segments.text: CAROLINE: Right, that's fine.
segments.translation: 卡洛琳：好，就这样。

segments.text: Oh, and could I have a phone number we can contact you on?
segments.translation: 哦，能否留个电话以便我们联系你？

segments.text: ROGER: Yes, my mobile number's 07788 136711.
CAROLINE: Thank you.
segments.translation: 卡洛琳：谢谢。

segments.text: Well, we'll look forward to seeing you next week.
segments.translation: 嗯，那么下周见。

segments.text: ROGER: Thanks very much. Goodbye.
segments.translation: 罗杰：非常感谢。再见。

segments.text: CAROLINE: Bye.
segments.translation: 卡洛琳：再见。
